home.seoDescription: A professional React skeleton with Vite, TypeScript, and TailwindCSS. Features production-ready auth, RBAC, and real-time notifications.
home.subtitle: Stop rebuilding the same infrastructure. Start with a production-ready foundation featuring authentication, RBAC, real-time sockets, and a premium UI library.
home.ctaTitle: Ready to ship your next big idea?
home.ctaDescription: Join thousands of developers using AppName to build scalable, secure applications in record time.

security.title: Enterprise Security
security.description: Robust RBAC, JWT authentication with secure cookies, and comprehensive audit logging built-in.

realtime.title: Real-time Updates
realtime.description: Seamless Socket.IO integration for instant notifications, presence tracking, and data syncing.

global.title: Global Ready
global.description: Full i18n support with runtime language uploads and dynamic translation bundles.

runtime.resetLinkSentDescription: If that email exists in our system, you will receive a password reset link shortly.
runtime.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
runtime.verifyEmailSuccessDescription: We've sent a verification link to your email address. Please click the link to verify your account.
runtime.resetPasswordDescription: Please enter your new password below.
runtime.verifyingEmailDescription: Please wait while we confirm your account.
runtime.emailVerifiedDescription: Your email address has been successfully verified. You can now access all features.
runtime.verificationFailedDescription: The verification link is invalid or has expired.
runtime.missingTokenDescription: No verification token was found in the URL.
runtime.aboutMission: We believe that every developer should spend their time building features, not fighting infrastructure. AppName is our contribution to a more productive developer ecosystem.
runtime.openSourceDescription: This project is built by the community, for the community. We are committed to keeping the core skeleton free and open source forever.
runtime.cuttingEdgeDescription: We track the latest developments in the React ecosystem to ensure you're always working with the best tools available.
runtime.coreTeamDescription: AppName was started by a group of senior software engineers tired of writing the same boilerplate code for every new SaaS venture. Our goal is to provide a "Standard Library" for professional web applications.
runtime.builtWithPassion: Built with passion and a lot of caffeine across 4 continents.
runtime.contactDescription: Whether you have a question about features, pricing, or anything else, our team is ready to answer.
runtime.messageSentDescription: Thank you for reaching out. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
runtime.notFoundDescription: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved to another quadrant of the galaxy.
runtime.dashboardSubtitle: Manage your profile, notifications, sessions, and account security from one place.
runtime.noNotificationsYet: You don't have any notifications yet.
runtime.deviceManagementDescription: This is a list of devices that have recently logged into your account. You can revoke any session that you don't recognize.
runtime.noSessionsDescription: We couldn't retrieve your active sessions. Please try again.
runtime.revokeSessionDescription: Are you sure you want to log out this device? The user will be immediately disconnected from the application.
runtime.dangerZoneDescription: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. Please be certain.
runtime.deleteUploadDescription: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this file? This action is irreversible and the file will be removed from cloud storage.
runtime.deleteUserDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this user? This action cannot be undone. All their data will be permanently removed.
runtime.auditHistoryPlaceholder: Audit history for this user will appear here.
runtime.deleteRoleDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this role? This will affect all users currently assigned to it.
runtime.languagesInstructions: Download the model JSON, translate every key, then upload the completed language file.
runtime.languageIsoHint: Use ISO code, for example es, de, pt-br.
runtime.forbiddenDescription: You don't have the necessary permissions to view this secure area. If you believe this is a mistake, please contact your administrator.
runtime.serverErrorDescription: Our servers are having a bit of a moment. We've been notified and are working on fixing the issue as fast as we can.
runtime.settingsDescription: Manage your account settings and preferences
runtime.deleteAccountWarning: This action is permanent and cannot be undone. All your data will be permanently removed.
runtime.dataLoadErrorDescription: An error occurred while loading this data. Please try again.
runtime.fileTooLarge: File is too large. Max size is {{size}}
runtime.systemPermissionsDescription: Reference for all available access control points
runtime.storageManagementDescription: Manage user uploads and system storage
